title: Shareable Views with Password Protected Links
excerpt: The ability to do shareadable board views and password protect the link would be neat. The specific usecase I’m thinking of is a way to share a list of action items/goals with a client that they can look at without havin…

posts.author: Rmannen (Ryan Mannen)
posts.cookedHtml: The ability to do shareadable board views and password protect the link would be neat. The specific usecase I’m thinking of is a way to share a list of action items/goals with a client that they can look at without having to sign into a Monday.com guest account.
